content.text:
<user_query>
In /workspaces/agno, commit and push all changes related to provisioner scaffold updates (deploy-cloudrun workflow, git exclusions, wire-cloudrun bootstrap, etc.).

Steps:
1. Run `git status`, `git diff`, `git log -5 --oneline` to understand state
2. Stage all relevant changed files (not secrets)
3. Commit with a message like:
   ```
   fix(provisioner): exclude operator scripts from customer repos and align Cloud Run deploy

   Stop pushing bootstrap/operator tooling to provisioned repos, remove legacy
   cloudbuild/staging references, and require AGENTS_MCP_HTTP_URL with bootstrap
   placeholder plus post-deploy sync.
   ```
4. Push to remote with `git push` (or `git push -u origin HEAD` if needed)
5. Return: branch name, commit hash, push result, list of files committed
</user_query>

Checking git state, then staging, committing, and pushing provisioner scaffold changes.

[REDACTED]

input.description: List untracked files and git-provision script

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git ls-files agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/git-provision-only-paths.sh && git check-ignore -v agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/git-provision-only-paths.sh 2>/dev/null || true

input.description: List tracked bootstrap scaffold files in agno

content.text:
Staging remaining scaffold files and committing.

[REDACTED]

input.command:
cd /workspaces/agno && git add \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/deploy-cloudrun.workflow.yml \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/setup-cloudrun-github-main.sh \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/bootstrap/wire-cloudrun-supabase.sh && \
  git add -f agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/git-provision-only-paths.sh && \
  git status
input.description: Stage all provisioner scaffold changes including force-add

input.command:
cd /workspaces/agno && git add \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/.gitignore \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/publish-placeholder-to-github.sh \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/print-publish-link-summary.sh \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/rebrand-and-push.sh \
  tests/unit/provisioner/test_scaffold_pack.py && \
  git add -f \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/deploy-cloudrun.workflow.yml \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/setup-cloudrun-github-main.sh \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/git-provision-only-paths.sh \
  agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/bootstrap/wire-cloudrun-supabase.sh && \
  git status
input.description: Force-add ignored bootstrap paths and stage rest

input.command:
cd /workspaces/agno && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(provisioner): exclude operator scripts from customer repos and align Cloud Run deploy

Stop pushing bootstrap/operator tooling to provisioned repos, remove legacy
cloudbuild/staging references, and require AGENTS_MCP_HTTP_URL with bootstrap
placeholder plus post-deploy sync.
EOF
)"

input.description: Verify commit hash and clean status

input.final_summary:
**Branch:** `feat/provisioner-project-name-validation`  
**Commit:** `feba601`  
**Push:** succeeded (`74ed400..feba601` → `origin/feat/provisioner-project-name-validation`)

**Files committed (9):**
- `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/.gitignore`
- `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/deploy-cloudrun.workflow.yml`
- `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/git-provision-only-paths.sh` (new)
- `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/publish-placeholder-to-github.sh`
- `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/setup-cloudrun-github-main.sh`
- `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/bootstrap/wire-cloudrun-supabase.sh`
- `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/print-publish-link-summary.sh`
- `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/rebrand-and-push.sh`
- `tests/unit/provisioner/test_scaffold_pack.py`

Pre-commit hooks (yaml, ruff, mypy) passed on commit. `git-provision-only-paths.sh` was force-added because the scaffold `.gitignore` `bootstrap/` rule would otherwise ignore it in this repo.

content.text:
## Result

| Item | Value |
|------|--------|
| **Branch** | `feat/provisioner-project-name-validation` |
| **Commit** | `feba601` |
| **Push** | OK — `74ed400..feba601` → `origin/feat/provisioner-project-name-validation` |

### Files committed (9)

1. `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/.gitignore`
2. `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/deploy-cloudrun.workflow.yml`
3. `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/git-provision-only-paths.sh` **(new)**
4. `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/publish-placeholder-to-github.sh`
5. `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/bootstrap/setup-cloudrun-github-main.sh`
6. `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/bootstrap/wire-cloudrun-supabase.sh`
7. `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/print-publish-link-summary.sh`
8. `agents/provisioner/fixtures/rebase-ai-scaffold/scripts/rebrand-and-push.sh`
9. `tests/unit/provisioner/test_scaffold_pack.py`

Working tree is clean. Pre-commit (yaml, ruff, mypy) passed.

**Note:** `git-provision-only-paths.sh` was added with `git add -f` so it stays tracked in agno even though the scaffold `.gitignore` lists `bootstrap/` for customer repos.
